title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.240 - Statewide dental delivery system authorized
text:
208.240.  Statewide dental delivery system authorized. — The MO HealthNet division within the department of social services may implement a statewide dental delivery system to ensure participation of and access to providers in all areas of the state.  The MO HealthNet division may administer the system or may seek a third party experienced in the administration of dental benefits to administer the program under the supervision of the division.
(L. 2013 S.B. 127)
